headline: Onsemi CEO issues bold 2-word message after earnings

headline: Electric Vehicles Update - Onsemi Advances in Semiconductor Solutions for Automotive Innovation
summary: Recent developments in the electric vehicle (EV) sector highlight onsemi's advancements in semiconductor solutions crucial for automotive applications. The company's latest quarterly results reveal significant growth in their AI data center business and notable progress in 900V EV architectures, enhancing vehicle performance with extended range and rapid charging. Collaborations with automotive giants like Geely and NIO further exhibit evolving partnerships that push the boundaries of EV...

headline: onsemi Announces Proposed Private Offering of $1.3 Billion of Convertible Senior Notes
summary: SCOTTSDALE, Ariz., May 06, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- ON Semiconductor Corporation (Nasdaq: ON) (“onsemi”) announced today that it intends to offer, subject to market and other conditions, $1.3 billion aggregate principal amount of Convertible Senior Notes due 2031 (the “notes”) in a private offering. The notes will be offered only to persons reasonably believed to be qualified institutional buyers in accordance with Rule 144A under the Securities Act of 1933, as amended (the “Securities Act”). on
